rule_metadata.name: Pachine
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'Pachine' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule Pachine
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'Pachine' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "Pachine"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\s\-dc\-host\s.{0,1000}\s\-spn\s.{0,1000}\s\-impersonate\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /\.\/pachine\.py/
		$string3 = "/ly4k/Pachine" nocase ascii wide
		$string4 = /python.{0,1000}\spachine\.py/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
